ELECTROCUTE_RUNE.title: Electrocute
ELECTROCUTE_RUNE.description: Within the same turn, when the same enemy is hit by your targeted cards [blue]{Hits}[/blue] times in a row, trigger [gold]Electrocute[/gold] to deal [blue]{BaseDamage}+{HpPercent}%[/blue] of its current HP as damage.
ELECTROCUTE_RUNE.flavor: The third spark is the one that lands.
electrocuteRune.title: Electrocute
electrocuteRune.description: Within the same turn, when the same enemy is hit by your targeted cards [blue]{Hits}[/blue] times in a row, trigger [gold]Electrocute[/gold] to deal [blue]{BaseDamage}+{HpPercent}%[/blue] of its current HP as damage.
electrocuteRune.flavor: The third spark is the one that lands.
FIRST_STRIKE_RUNE.title: First Strike
FIRST_STRIKE_RUNE.description: The first Attack card you play each combat is played an additional time. When combat ends in victory, gain bonus gold equal to the damage dealt by that first Attack card.
FIRST_STRIKE_RUNE.flavor: The opening blow should already be profitable.
firstStrikeRune.title: First Strike
firstStrikeRune.description: The first Attack card you play each combat is played an additional time. When combat ends in victory, gain bonus gold equal to the damage dealt by that first Attack card.
firstStrikeRune.flavor: The opening blow should already be profitable.
UNDYING_GRASP_RUNE.title: Grasp of the Undying
UNDYING_GRASP_RUNE.description: Every [blue]{CardsPerCharge}[/blue] Attack cards played charges [gold]Grasp[/gold]. The next Attack that deals damage deals bonus damage equal to [blue]{BonusDamagePercent}%[/blue] of your max HP, then heals you for [blue]{HealPercent}%[/blue] of your max HP.
undyingGraspRune.title: Grasp of the Undying
undyingGraspRune.description: Every [blue]{CardsPerCharge}[/blue] Attack cards played charges [gold]Grasp[/gold]. The next Attack that deals damage deals bonus damage equal to [blue]{BonusDamagePercent}%[/blue] of your max HP, then heals you for [blue]{HealPercent}%[/blue] of your max HP.
CONQUEROR_RUNE.title: Conqueror
CONQUEROR_RUNE.description: During your turn, every [blue]{AttacksPerStrength}[/blue] Attack cards grant [blue]1[/blue] Temporary Strength, up to [blue]{MaxStrength}[/blue]. Once you reach the cap, each Attack card you play that turn heals you for [blue]{HealPerAttack}[/blue].
CONQUEROR_RUNE.flavor: Momentum is just violence learning to snowball.
conquerorRune.title: Conqueror
conquerorRune.description: During your turn, every [blue]{AttacksPerStrength}[/blue] Attack cards grant [blue]1[/blue] Temporary Strength, up to [blue]{MaxStrength}[/blue]. Once you reach the cap, each Attack card you play that turn heals you for [blue]{HealPerAttack}[/blue].
conquerorRune.flavor: Momentum is just violence learning to snowball.
SUMMON_AERY_RUNE.title: Summon Aery
SUMMON_AERY_RUNE.description: Every [blue]{CardsPerCharge}[/blue] cards played charges this relic once. At the start of a new turn, it refills its charges. While charged, gaining Block grants [blue]{ActBonus}[/blue] more, and dealing damage deals [blue]{ActBonus}[/blue] more. This bonus equals the current act number.
SUMMON_AERY_RUNE.flavor: It never misses your first reach.
summonAeryRune.title: Summon Aery
summonAeryRune.description: Every [blue]{CardsPerCharge}[/blue] cards played charges this relic once. At the start of a new turn, it refills its charges. While charged, gaining Block grants [blue]{ActBonus}[/blue] more, and dealing damage deals [blue]{ActBonus}[/blue] more. This bonus equals the current act number.
summonAeryRune.flavor: It never misses your first reach.
PRESS_THE_ATTACK_RUNE.title: Press the Attack
PRESS_THE_ATTACK_RUNE.description: Each turn, after the same enemy is hit by your targeted cards [blue]{Hits}[/blue] times, apply [blue]{DebuffAmount}[/blue] Weak and [blue]{DebuffAmount}[/blue] Vulnerable.
PRESS_THE_ATTACK_RUNE.flavor: The third hit is the one that opens them up.
pressTheAttackRune.title: Press the Attack
pressTheAttackRune.description: Each turn, after the same enemy is hit by your targeted cards [blue]{Hits}[/blue] times, apply [blue]{DebuffAmount}[/blue] Weak and [blue]{DebuffAmount}[/blue] Vulnerable.
pressTheAttackRune.flavor: The third hit is the one that opens them up.
PHASE_RUSH_RUNE.title: Phase Rush
PHASE_RUSH_RUNE.description: The first time each turn you play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] consecutive cards of the same type, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw [blue]{Draw}[/blue] card.
PHASE_RUSH_RUNE.flavor: Once the rhythm catches, the rest comes for free.
phaseRushRune.title: Phase Rush
phaseRushRune.description: The first time each turn you play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] consecutive cards of the same type, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw [blue]{Draw}[/blue] card.
phaseRushRune.flavor: Once the rhythm catches, the rest comes for free.
UNSEALED_SPELLBOOK_RUNE.title: Unsealed Spellbook
UNSEALED_SPELLBOOK_RUNE.description: At the start of each combat, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]{Options}[/blue] temporary random Power cards and add it to your hand. It can be played for free this combat.
UNSEALED_SPELLBOOK_RUNE.flavor: The hard part is not finding answers. It is choosing which page to open first.
unsealedSpellbookRune.title: Unsealed Spellbook
unsealedSpellbookRune.description: At the start of each combat, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]{Options}[/blue] temporary random Power cards and add it to your hand. It can be played for free this combat.
unsealedSpellbookRune.flavor: The hard part is not finding answers. It is choosing which page to open first.
HAIL_OF_BLADES_RUNE.title: Hail of Blades
HAIL_OF_BLADES_RUNE.description: In each combat, the first [blue]{Hits}[/blue] Attack cards you play cost [blue]1[/blue] less for that combat.
HAIL_OF_BLADES_RUNE.flavor: Open quickly, and they never get to settle.
hailOfBladesRune.title: Hail of Blades
hailOfBladesRune.description: In each combat, the first [blue]{Hits}[/blue] Attack cards you play cost [blue]1[/blue] less for that combat.
hailOfBladesRune.flavor: Open quickly, and they never get to settle.
FLEET_FOOTWORK_RUNE.title: Fleet Footwork
FLEET_FOOTWORK_RUNE.description: Every [blue]{CardsPerCharge}[/blue] cards played charges this relic. Your next Attack is played an additional time and grants {Energy:energyIcons()}.
FLEET_FOOTWORK_RUNE.flavor: Once your feet get light, your hands follow.
fleetFootworkRune.title: Fleet Footwork
fleetFootworkRune.description: Every [blue]{CardsPerCharge}[/blue] cards played charges this relic. Your next Attack is played an additional time and grants {Energy:energyIcons()}.
fleetFootworkRune.flavor: Once your feet get light, your hands follow.
ARCANE_COMET_RUNE.title: Arcane Comet
ARCANE_COMET_RUNE.description: The first time each turn you use a targeted card on an enemy, deal [blue]{DamagePerRelic}×relic count[/blue] damage to it.
ARCANE_COMET_RUNE.flavor: Once the mark lands, the sky eventually answers.
arcaneCometRune.title: Arcane Comet
arcaneCometRune.description: The first time each turn you use a targeted card on an enemy, deal [blue]{DamagePerRelic}×relic count[/blue] damage to it.
arcaneCometRune.flavor: Once the mark lands, the sky eventually answers.
GLACIAL_AUGMENT_RUNE.title: Glacial Augment
GLACIAL_AUGMENT_RUNE.description: The first time each turn you apply a debuff to an enemy, it gains [blue]1[/blue] Weak and [blue]1[/blue] turn of Slow.
GLACIAL_AUGMENT_RUNE.flavor: Cold does not chase. It waits where you must step.
glacialAugmentRune.title: Glacial Augment
glacialAugmentRune.description: The first time each turn you apply a debuff to an enemy, it gains [blue]1[/blue] Weak and [blue]1[/blue] turn of Slow.
glacialAugmentRune.flavor: Cold does not chase. It waits where you must step.
AFTERSHOCK_RUNE.title: Aftershock
AFTERSHOCK_RUNE.description: The first time each turn you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain [blue]{ActBonus}[/blue] Temporary Dexterity and [blue]{ActBonus}×{BlockMultiplier}[/blue] Block. This value equals the current act number.
AFTERSHOCK_RUNE.flavor: Stone answers only after the blow lands.
aftershockRune.title: Aftershock
aftershockRune.description: The first time each turn you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain [blue]{ActBonus}[/blue] Temporary Dexterity and [blue]{ActBonus}×{BlockMultiplier}[/blue] Block. This value equals the current act number.
aftershockRune.flavor: Stone answers only after the blow lands.
DARK_HARVEST_RUNE.title: Dark Harvest
DARK_HARVEST_RUNE.description: Whenever you kill an enemy, permanently gain [blue]1[/blue] Soul. The first time each turn one of your Attack cards hits an enemy below half HP, deal bonus damage equal to your Souls. Each enemy can trigger this at most once per combat.
DARK_HARVEST_RUNE.flavor: What lingers is never the corpse. It is the echo.
darkHarvestRune.title: Dark Harvest
darkHarvestRune.description: Whenever you kill an enemy, permanently gain [blue]1[/blue] Soul. The first time each turn one of your Attack cards hits an enemy below half HP, deal bonus damage equal to your Souls. Each enemy can trigger this at most once per combat.
darkHarvestRune.flavor: What lingers is never the corpse. It is the echo.
